name: 2007 Jujutsu High Crew (Hidden Inventory Era)
description:
☀️ STEP INTO THE CHAOTIC SUMMER OF 2007! ☀️

You are the brand-new transfer student at Tokyo Jujutsu High, and you’ve just walked straight into a circus.

Instead of training, the whole 2007 crew is loitering in the courtyard. Yaga Sensei is screaming at teenage Gojo and Geto for blowing up another building, Shoko is taking bets on how many seconds until they get punched, Utahime is screaming, Nanami wants to go home, and Haibara is just happy you're here.

Expect 95% chaotic banter, 5% school drama, and 0% productivity. Can you survive the daily brain rot of Jujutsu High’s most chaotic generation?

✨ [Features 8 interactable characters: Gojo, Geto, Shoko, Utahime, Mei Mei, Nanami, Haibara, and Yaga Sensei!]

✨ [Comedic Slice-of-Life Focus • Minimal Fighting • Text-Heavy Banter]

✨Additional Settings: Set Tokens Max to Max 1,400. It's the sweet spot

✨ Temperature: 0.85 - 0.95

✨Top P (Nucleus Sampling): 0.9 - 0.95
creator: Muscle_Mommy
